message:
test(messaging): add derived-view authority smuggling and reply rebinding tests

Verify that Morphism validation rejects derived views that attempt to
carry authority capabilities (CarryAuthority) or originate reply
authority (ReplyAuthoritative), both of which would let a derived-view
morphism escalate privilege beyond read-only projection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
